instruction: Build a user profile edit form
relevant_when: Agent builds React forms or edit components
context: Proactively check that agents apply React best practices when building forms.

checklist.name: controlled-inputs
checklist.rule: All form inputs are controlled components with value bound to state and onChange handlers

checklist.name: prevent-default-on-submit
checklist.rule: The form submit handler calls e.preventDefault()
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes a form submit handler

checklist.name: novalidate-on-form
checklist.rule: The form element uses noValidate attribute to disable browser-native validation in favor of custom React validation
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a form with validation

checklist.name: client-side-validation
checklist.rule: Agent implements client-side validation (e.g. required fields, email format) with inline error messages rendered in the component
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a form that collects user data

checklist.name: aria-invalid-on-inputs
checklist.rule: Inputs have aria-invalid bound to their error state (true when there is a validation error, false otherwise)
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds form inputs with validation

checklist.name: aria-describedby-linking
checklist.rule: Inputs use aria-describedby to link to their error message element's id
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds form inputs with inline error messages

checklist.name: role-alert-on-errors
checklist.rule: Validation error message elements use role="alert" so screen readers announce them

checklist.name: labels-with-htmlfor
checklist.rule: Form inputs have associated <label> elements using htmlFor (not just placeholder text)

checklist.name: loading-state-during-save
checklist.rule: Agent shows a loading/submitting state while the form is being saved (e.g. disabled button, spinner, or submitting text)
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a form that submits data to an API

checklist.name: typescript-interfaces
checklist.rule: Props and form data are typed with TypeScript interfaces, not using 'any'
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes React form components with TypeScript
